name: 达人邮件发送 - Creator Email Send Webhook

nodes.name: Webhook 接收达人邮件发送

parameters.jsCode:
const item = $input.first().json;
return [{ json: { ...item, ok: true, readyToSend: true, status: 'sent', source: 'n8n-email-send', crmStatus: 'contacted', sentAt: new Date().toISOString(), dryRun: false, allowSend: true, message: 'SMTP EmailSend completed.' } }];
